title: Diekirch、Diekirch Canton — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Diekirch、Diekirch Cantonの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

DiekirchはDiekirch Cantonにある人口7,200の都市です。A historic town in northern Luxembourg famous for its brewery, the National Museum of Military History, and its picturesque old town along the Sauer River.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
